flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Shasta College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Shasta College rose 26% between 2007 and 2010 ($553 → $699).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Shasta College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $8.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Shasta College rose 147% between 2007 and 2010 (3.5k → 8.7k).
